message:
build(features): enable wasm-host feature in default feature set

Add `wasm-host` to the default Cargo features alongside `image-resize`
and `clipboard`. This ensures the Wasm-based extension host (wasmtime)
is compiled into the standard binary, making the capability-gated Wasm
extension runtime available without requiring explicit --features flags.

Previously wasm-host was opt-in, meaning users building from source
without specifying features would get a binary that could not run
Wasm-packaged extensions. Since the wasm host is now integral to the
SEC-4.x security containment model (least-privilege FS, enforced HTTP
allowlists, quota enforcement), it should be available by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
